title: Stardom's Dungeons
description: A mod that adds late game dungeons to the game!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05d11b28b8d0c8877e04e56e92ec40a4b944f2cd.png)

Stardom's Dungeons is a mod that aims to add end-game dungeons into the game.

Currently, the mod contains many unbreakable blocks (these are to ensure the dungeons aren't cheesable), unlockable doors, and keys.

- Dungeons:
  - Zombie Dungeon
    - 1 floor of zombies.
    - Special Rewards include:
        - Putrid Blade
  - Skeleton Dungeon
    - 2 floors of Skeletons.
    - Special Rewards include:
      - Skeletal Crown
  - Creeper Dungeon
    - 3 floors of creepers, each time increasing in quantity.
    - Special Rewards include:
      - TNT Infused Arrows
  - Blaze Dungeon
    - Generates in the Nether
    - 8 rooms of blazes.
    - Special Rewards include:
      - Fireheart Staff
  - Wither Skeleton Dungeon
    - Generates in the Nether
    - 3 rooms of Wither Skeletons
    - Special Rewards include:
      - Withered Ribs
  - Magma Cube Dungeon
    - Generates in the Nether
    - Special Reward:
      - Magma Boots
  - Endermite Dungeon
    - Generates in the End
    - Special Rewards:
      - Staff of Scalling
      - Arrow of Growing
      - Arrow of Shrinking
  - Shulker Dungeon
    - Generates int the End
    - Special Reward:
      - Staff of Levitation
  - Enderman Dungeon
    - Generates in the End
    - Special Reward:
      - Dimensional Pearl


- Items:
  - Putrid Blade:
    - A sword that deals 25 extra damage to undead mobs
    - Inflicts non-undead mobs with poison
  - Skeletal Crown
    - A helmet that makes skeletons friendly to the wearer
  - TNT Infused Arrows:
    - Arrows that explode on impact.
    - Uncraftable
    - Only found in Creeper Dungeons
  - Magma Boots
    - Turns lava into obsidian
    - Grants fire resistance
    - Shift-Jump to do a charged jump
    - Grants immunity to fall damage
  - Flameheart Staff
    - Shoots fireballs
  - Withered Ribs
    - Grants wither immunity
    - Inflicts attackers with wither
    - 1 in 25 chance to knockback mobs when taking damage
  - Staff of Scaling
    - Right click mob to shrink it
    - Shift-right click mob to grow it
    - Right click air/block to shrink yourself
    - Shift-right click air/block to grow yourself
  - Arrow of Growing
    - Enlarges mob
  - Arrow of Shrinking
    - Shrinks mob
  - Staff of Levitation
    - Right click to shoot shulker bullets
    - Shift-right click to grant yourself levitation
    - Shift to grant yourself slow falling
  - Dimensional Pearl
    - Shift-right click to set position
    - Right click to teleport to set position
    - Works across dimensions
  - Keys and Fragments
    - 2 tiny fragments can be crafted into 1 small fragment
    - 2 small fragments can be crafted into 1 large fragment
    - 4 large fragments can be crafted into a key
    - The key is used to open the dungeon doors and are required to proceed to the next floor
- Blocks:
  - Hard Concrete
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
  - Dungeon Lights
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
  - Dungeon Doors
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
  - Dungeon Trapdoors
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
  - Reinforced Stained Glass
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
  - Dungeon Soul Sand
    - Unbreakable
    - Unobtainable
